meta_title: For Freelancers: user onboarding to Solve no project ideas (Beginner Resource Page)
meta_description: Learn how to user onboarding and overcome no project ideas. A Beginner-level Resource Page using Antigravity and Claude Code.

content.seo_title: For Freelancers: User Onboarding to Solve No Project Ideas
content.seo_description: Stop struggling with project ideas. Learn how to build high-converting user onboarding flows using Antigravity and Claude Code to impress your freelance clients.
content.answer_block: If you lack project ideas, build user onboarding flows. It is the highest-leverage feature for SaaS clients. By mastering onboarding, you solve the 'empty state' problem, increase client retention, and create a repeatable, high-value micro-SaaS component that you can plug into any project you build for your clients.
content.intro:
The blank editor is the freelancer’s greatest enemy. You stare at the screen, waiting for inspiration, while your billable hours evaporate. The market isn't looking for another generic clone; it’s desperate for better user experiences. Every SaaS founder you meet is bleeding users in the first five minutes because their onboarding is a friction-filled nightmare.

Stop chasing the 'perfect' idea. Instead, become the architect of first impressions. By focusing on onboarding, you turn a technical skill into a product-growth asset. You aren't just writing code; you are building the bridge between a user’s curiosity and their first 'aha!' moment. This is how you stop guessing and start shipping.

steps.title: Define the Value Milestone
steps.description: Identify the one action that proves a user understands the product. We focus on getting them there in under 60 seconds.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Create a schema for a 3-step onboarding flow that guides a user to their first successful action, focusing on low-friction data collection.
steps.claude_code_command: claude run --task 'generate onboarding schema for a SaaS dashboard'

steps.title: Build the Skeleton UI
steps.description: Use Antigravity to scaffold the UI shell so you aren't starting from a blank CSS file.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Build a responsive, modern onboarding carousel component using Tailwind CSS that handles progress tracking.

steps.title: Implement State Persistence
steps.description: Ensure the user doesn't lose progress if they refresh. Use local storage to track their journey.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write a React hook that persists onboarding step state to localStorage and triggers a callback when completed.

steps.title: Integrate Contextual Tooltips
steps.description: Use AI to generate copy that guides the user without being intrusive.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Generate 5 variations of high-converting, empathetic micro-copy for a 'Profile Setup' onboarding step.
steps.claude_code_command: claude chat 'Refine the onboarding copy to be more concise and action-oriented'

steps.title: Final QA and Edge Case Handling
steps.description: Test the flow against common user errors like jumping steps or closing the modal prematurely.
steps.antigravity_prompt: Write unit tests for the onboarding flow covering navigation, state persistence, and completion events.

pro_tips: Always measure time-to-value (TTV); if your onboarding takes longer than two minutes, you are losing 40% of your users.
Use skeleton screens during onboarding loading states to keep users engaged while data fetches.
Add a 'Skip' button. Forcing users through a 10-step tour is the fastest way to get an uninstall.
Gamify the process with a progress bar. Psychology shows users are more likely to finish if they see they are 66% done.
Use Claude Code to analyze your onboarding logs to identify exactly where users drop off, then iterate on that specific step.
content.next_steps: Once your onboarding flow is live, package it as a reusable component library. Market this to your current and future clients as a 'Conversion-Ready Onboarding Module' to increase your project rates.
content.conversion_block: You now have a repeatable blueprint to transform any app into a high-converting machine. Stop waiting for the perfect idea and start building the infrastructure that every SaaS needs to survive. Ready to build? Join our AI Builder community → Start your first project today.
